requirement_topic.en: Local Importer / Authorised Dealer and PVOC Certificate
requirement_topic.zh: 本地进口商／授权经销商及PVOC证书
requirement_topic.zht: 本地進口商／授權經銷商及PVOC證書

summary.en: A locally registered Kenya importer or authorised dealer is required for CA type approval registration and market entry. Importers must be registered with the Communications Authority of Kenya. In addition, the PVOC (Pre-Export Verification of Conformity) programme administered by KEBS requires that regulated electronics exports to Kenya obtain a PVOC certificate of conformity issued by a KEBS-accredited inspection body (Bureau Veritas, SGS, or Intertek) at the factory in China before shipment. The PVOC certificate must accompany the goods on arrival at the port of entry.
summary.zh: 须委任在肯尼亚本地注册的进口商或授权经销商，用于CA型式批准注册及市场准入。进口商须在肯尼亚通信管理局注册。此外，KEBS管理的PVOC（出口前合规验证）计划要求，向肯尼亚出口的受监管电子产品须在中国工厂由KEBS认可检验机构（必维、SGS或天祥）出具PVOC合规证书后方可装运。PVOC证书须随货品于入境口岸到达时提交。
summary.zht: 須委任在肯尼亞本地註冊的進口商或授權經銷商，用於CA型式批准註冊及市場准入。進口商須在肯尼亞通訊管理局註冊。此外，KEBS管理的PVOC（出口前合規驗證）計劃要求，向肯尼亞出口的受監管電子產品須在中國工廠由KEBS認可檢驗機構（必維、SGS或天祥）出具PVOC合規證書後方可裝運。PVOC證書須隨貨品於入境口岸到達時提交。

standards_or_laws: Kenya Information and Communications Act Cap 411A — importer registration requirement
KEBS PVOC Programme — Pre-Export Verification of Conformity for regulated imports
Kenya Bureau of Standards Legal Notice No. 103 (PVOC designated products)

summary.en: China has no domestic equivalent to the Kenya PVOC requirement. For China-domestic sales, the manufacturer or a domestic distributor handles CCC registration without a pre-export verification obligation. Chinese exporters must engage a KEBS-accredited inspection body (Bureau Veritas, SGS, or Intertek) at the factory or in China to obtain the PVOC certificate before shipment to Kenya.
summary.zh: 中国国内没有与肯尼亚PVOC要求等同的制度。对于国内销售，制造商或国内经销商办理CCC注册，无需履行出口前核验义务。中国出口商须在工厂或在中国境内委托KEBS认可检验机构（必维、SGS或天祥），在向肯尼亚装运前取得PVOC证书。
summary.zht: 中國國內沒有與肯尼亞PVOC要求等同的制度。對於國內銷售，製造商或國內經銷商辦理CCC註冊，無需履行出口前核驗義務。中國出口商須在工廠或在中國境內委託KEBS認可檢驗機構（必維、SGS或天祥），在向肯尼亞裝運前取得PVOC證書。

standards_or_laws: No China-domestic equivalent to PVOC; CCC registration (China) covers domestic market entry only

gap.en: No China-domestic process maps to the Kenya PVOC requirement. Chinese exporters must engage a KEBS-accredited inspection body in China (Bureau Veritas, SGS, or Intertek) to obtain a PVOC certificate before shipment. A locally registered Kenya importer or authorised dealer must also be appointed for CA registration purposes. Both requirements must be satisfied before goods arrive at the Kenyan port of entry.
gap.zh: 中国国内流程不涵盖肯尼亚PVOC要求。中国出口商须在中国境内委托KEBS认可检验机构（必维、SGS或天祥）在装运前取得PVOC证书。此外，还须为CA注册目的委任在肯尼亚本地注册的进口商或授权经销商。两项要求须在货品抵达肯尼亚入境口岸前均满足。
gap.zht: 中國國內流程不涵蓋肯尼亞PVOC要求。中國出口商須在中國境內委託KEBS認可檢驗機構（必維、SGS或天祥）在裝運前取得PVOC證書。此外，還須為CA註冊目的委任在肯尼亞本地註冊的進口商或授權經銷商。兩項要求須在貨品抵達肯尼亞入境口岸前均滿足。

source.publisher: Kenya Bureau of Standards (KEBS) — PVOC Programme

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Kenya-registered local importer or authorised dealer is mandatory for CA registration. A PVOC certificate from a KEBS-accredited body (Bureau Veritas, SGS, or Intertek) obtained at the Chinese factory before shipment is required for regulated electronics exports to Kenya. There is no China-domestic equivalent to PVOC.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] CA注册须委任肯尼亚本地注册的进口商或授权经销商。向肯尼亚出口受监管电子产品须在中国工厂装运前由KEBS认可机构（必维、SGS或天祥）出具PVOC证书。中国国内无与PVOC等同的制度。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] CA註冊須委任肯尼亞本地註冊的進口商或授權經銷商。向肯尼亞出口受監管電子產品須在中國工廠裝運前由KEBS認可機構（必維、SGS或天祥）出具PVOC證書。中國國內無與PVOC等同的制度。
